lessons.title: Optics Fundamentals: Transmission, Refraction, Prisms, and Lenses
objectives: Describe transmission of light through solid and liquid media
Explain refraction, refractive indexes of glasses, and how prisms change light direction
Explain how lenses focus and disperse light
cp105Topics: 5.1 Transmission of light through solid and liquid media
5.4 How prisms change the direction of light
5.5 How lenses focus and disperse light

lessons.title: Lens Trains, Fiber Optics, and Digital Technology
objectives: Describe lens optics and lens trains used in rigid scopes
Explain how fiber optics and fiber bundles transmit images and light
Summarize digitization and digital imaging technology in modern VT equipment

lessons.title: Generic Tools, Borescopes, Fiberscopes, and Video Borescopes
objectives: Apply generic tools such as magnifiers and mirrors to Level II inspection tasks
Compare rigid borescopes, fiberscopes, and video borescopes for access and image quality
Select the correct scope for a given access and resolution requirement
cp105Topics: 6.1 Generic tools such as magnifiers and mirrors

lessons.title: Video Borescope Measurement Techniques and Specialized Systems
objectives: Describe comparison, shadow, stereo, and laser-based video borescope measurement techniques
Identify specialized inspection systems including push-tube cameras, pipe crawlers, and subsea remote cameras
Select an appropriate measurement technique for sizing an indication remotely
